error TS-1: Pre-emit (2) and post-emit (3) diagnostic counts do not match! This can indicate that a semantic _error_ was added by the emit resolver - such an error may not be reflected on the command line or in the editor, but may be captured in a baseline here!

parserComputedPropertyName26.ts(4,6): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'e2'.


!!! error TS-1: Pre-emit (2) and post-emit (3) diagnostic counts do not match! This can indicate that a semantic _error_ was added by the emit resolver - such an error may not be reflected on the command line or in the editor, but may be captured in a baseline here!
!!! related TS-1: The excess diagnostics are:
!!! related TS2552 parserComputedPropertyName26.ts:3:6: Cannot find name 'e'. Did you mean 'E'?
==== parserComputedPropertyName26.ts (2 errors) ====
    enum E {
        // No ASI
        [e] = 0
        ~~~
!!! error TS1164: Computed property names are not allowed in enums.
        [e2] = 1
         ~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'e2'.
